title: Apple Hunger Bar
body:
## Just a resource pack that turns your hunger bar into apples **¯\\\_(ツ)\_/¯**
New *Slim* version available (as requested, find in versions)
### Inspired by JMHMirror. Revitalized/edited to work with 1.20+ # More coming soon (•̀ᴗ-) #### If you like this, see my other resource packs ## Compatibility Fully compatible with AppleSkin! #### Screenshots taken with Default Dark Mode installed. ### _______________________________________ *Should* work with any launcher versions 1.20.2+ * If you have issues, let me know Should *NOT* work with any versions pre-1.20.2 * hud sprites worked differently * I will not be making older versions, so... * See JMHMirror's version for 1.18 if you want ## Issues [![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49eac7d4916630c1ca7a85fe90f40e2363ae80eb.png)](https://discord.gg/W3T34eVScQ)
